name: Suspended Note
description: Single note held in infinite reverb space

prompts.label: single note held in infinite reverberant space
prompts.text: single note held in infinite reverberant space, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: sustained tone floating through boundless acoustic void
prompts.text: sustained tone floating through boundless acoustic void, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: frozen harmonic hovering without time or decay
prompts.text: frozen harmonic hovering without time or decay, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: cathedral organ note held beyond natural sustain
prompts.text: cathedral organ note held beyond natural sustain, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: time-stretched resonance existing in perpetual present
prompts.text: time-stretched resonance existing in perpetual present, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
